metadata.title: Move to Switzerland — Premium Rådgivning om Flytning
metadata.description: En specialiseret flytte- og formuerådgivningsservice for velhavende privatpersoner og familier, der flytter til Schweiz.

hero.headline: Din vej til Schweiz
hero.subheadline: En specialiseret flytte- og formuerådgivningsservice for velhavende privatpersoner og familier

whySwitzerland.title: Hvorfor Schweiz
whySwitzerland.subtitle: En nation bygget på stabilitet, diskretion og ekspertise

millionaires.label: Millionærer der flytter globalt i 2025 — historisk rekord

safety.label: Historik med aktivbeslaglæggelse eller militære alliancer

services.title: Vores ydelser

assetStructuring.title: Aktivstrukturering før immigration
assetStructuring.description: Realisering af gevinster før schweizisk bopæl; omstrukturering af aktiebesiddelser, trusts og UAE-virksomhedsstrukturer.
assetStructuring.detail: Vi arbejder med dine eksisterende rådgivere for at optimere din aktivstruktur.

lumpSum.title: Pauschalbeskatning (Forfait Fiscal)
lumpSum.description: Fuld forhandling af kantonal skatteafgørelse; fastlæggelse af skattegrundlag; løbende årlig compliance.
lumpSum.detail: Schweiz' pauschalbeskatningsordning tilbyder kvalificerede personer et skattegrundlag baseret på leveomkostninger.

residency.title: Opholdstilladelse og immigration
residency.description: Rådgivning om kantonsvalg; B-tilladelsesansøgning; familieinklusion; vej til C-tilladelse og statsborgerskab.
residency.detail: Valget af det rigtige kanton er den mest afgørende beslutning i din flytning.

companyFormation.title: Virksomhedsetablering og strukturering
companyFormation.description: Schweiziske holdingselskaber; IP-strukturer; koordinering med UAE-enheder; momsregistrering.
companyFormation.detail: Uanset om du har brug for et schweizisk holdingselskab eller koordinering med UAE-enheder.

familyOffice.title: Family Office etablering
familyOffice.description: SFO/MFO-rådgivning; private banking-introduktioner; trust- og fondstrukturering; successionsplanlægning.
familyOffice.detail: For familier der har brug for dedikeret formueforvaltningsinfrastruktur.

directorship.title: Uafhængige bestyrelsesydelser
directorship.description: Placering af schweizisk-bosiddende direktør; selskabssekretærydelser; governance-support.
directorship.detail: Mange schweiziske selskabsstrukturer kræver en schweizisk-bosiddende direktør.

realEstate.title: Ejendomsrådgivning
realEstate.description: Lex Koller-navigation; adgang til off-market ejendomme; erhvervelsesstrukturering; notarkoordinering.

privateBanking.title: Private Banking og formueforvaltning
privateBanking.detail: Åbning af et schweizisk private banking-forhold kræver omhyggelig forberedelse.

health.title: Sundheds- og wellness-concierge
health.detail: Det schweiziske sundhedssystem kræver obligatorisk forsikring.

lifestyle.title: Livsstilskoordinering og blød landing
lifestyle.description: Internationale skoleplacering; arbejdstilladelser til hushjælp; ægtefælleintegration.
lifestyle.detail: Din flytnings succes rækker langt ud over papirarbejde.

clients.title: Hvem vi betjener
clients.subtitle: Vores rådgivning er skræddersyet til din profil og dine mål

entrepreneur.title: Den etablerede iværksætter
entrepreneur.description: Virksomhedsejere der søger schweizisk bopæl før et likviditetsevent.

family.title: Den flyttende familie
family.description: Familier der prioriterer sikkerhed, uddannelse og livskvalitet.

youngWealth.title: Den unge formueejer
youngWealth.description: Digitale iværksættere og krypto-formueejere der søger en stabil jurisdiktion.

familyOffice.title: Gulf Family Office
familyOffice.description: Etablerede family offices der søger et europæisk governance-hub.

adrian.name: Adrian Burgi
adrian.bio: Schweizisk advokat og MBA. Adrian har etableret flere banker i Schweiz og har dybe relationer til FINMA og private banker.

robin.name: Robin Roy Krigslund-Hansen
robin.bio: Dansk serieiværksætter baseret i Schweiz. Over CHF 400 mio. i forvaltet digital annoncering. Taler tysk, dansk og engelsk.

about.pageSubtitle: Uafhængighed, fortrolighed og dybde i service

story.title: Vores historie
story.p1: Move to Switzerland blev grundlagt ud fra en simpel observation: velhavende personer der flytter fra Mellemøsten oplever et unødvendigt fragmenteret rådgivningslandskab.
story.p2: Vi skabte ét kontaktpunkt der orkestrerer hele flytningsrejsen.
story.p3: Hvert engagement håndteres med den diskretion og grundighed vores klienter forventer.

independence.title: Uafhængighed
independence.description: Vi er ikke bundet til nogen bank, advokatfirma eller ejendomsmægler.

confidentiality.title: Fortrolighed
confidentiality.description: Hvert engagement er beskyttet af streng fortrolighed.

depth.title: Dybde i service
depth.description: Vi henviser ikke og glemmer. Vi er med dig hele vejen.

form.name: Fulde navn
form.success: Tak. Din henvendelse er modtaget. Vi svarer inden for 24 timer.
form.error: Noget gik galt. Prøv venligst igen.

privacy.content: Denne privatlivspolitik forklarer hvordan Move to Switzerland indsamler, bruger og beskytter dine personoplysninger.

footer.tagline: Premium flytningsrådgivning for fornemme privatpersoner og familier.

servicesMeta.title: Vores ydelser — Move to Switzerland
servicesMeta.description: Omfattende rådgivningsydelser på alle dimensioner af din flytning til Schweiz.

whatsapp.message: Hej, jeg er interesseret i at høre mere om at flytte til Schweiz.

stickyBar.text: Klar til at starte din rejse til Schweiz?

meta.title: Hvorfor Schweiz — Verdens førende destination for rigdom, sikkerhed og livskvalitet
meta.description: Opdag hvorfor Schweiz er verdens mest betroede jurisdiktion for formuebevarelse og familiesikkerhed.

hero.title: Hvorfor Schweiz
hero.subtitle: Verdens førende destination for formuebevarelse, sikkerhed og livskvalitet

neutrality.title: Politisk neutralitet
neutrality.subtitle: Et tilflugtssted for stabilitet i en usikker verden
neutrality.p1: Schweiz har opretholdt politisk neutralitet i over 500 år. Landet er ikke medlem af NATO, EU eller nogen militær alliance.
neutrality.p2: For formueejere betyder dette en enestående garanti: Schweiz har aldrig konfiskeret private aktiver.

banking.title: Bank og formueforvaltning
banking.subtitle: Verdens mest betroede private banksystem
banking.p1: Schweiz forvalter ca. CHF 7,9 billioner i aktiver.
banking.p2: Schweiziske privatbanker tilbyder et niveau af personlig formueforvaltning uden sidestykke.

education.title: Uddannelsessystem
education.subtitle: Uddannelse i verdensklasse for næste generation
education.p1: Schweiz er hjemsted for nogle af verdens bedste uddannelsesinstitutioner.
education.p2: Det schweiziske uddannelsessystem kombinerer akademisk stringens med flersproget fordybelse.

healthcare.title: Sundhedsvæsen
healthcare.subtitle: Blandt verdens bedste sundhedssystemer
healthcare.p1: Det schweiziske sundhedsvæsen rangerer konsekvent blandt verdens bedste.
healthcare.p2: For tilflyttende familier tilbyder Schweiz tryghed.

tax.title: Skattesystem
tax.subtitle: Konkurrencedygtigt, gennemsigtigt og demokratisk beskyttet
tax.p1: Det schweiziske skattesystem nyder godt af en unik egenskab: kantonal konkurrence.
tax.p2: Pauschalbeskatningen giver kvalificerede udenlandske statsborgere mulighed for at betale skat baseret på leveomkostninger.

qualityOfLife.title: Livskvalitet
qualityOfLife.subtitle: Sikkerhed, infrastruktur og naturskønhed uden kompromis
qualityOfLife.p1: Schweiz rangerer konsekvent som verdens nr. 1 for livskvalitet.
qualityOfLife.p2: Sikkerhed i Schweiz er ikke kun en statistik; det er en levet oplevelse.

business.title: Erhvervsmiljø
business.subtitle: Hvor global handel møder schweizisk præcision
business.p1: Schweiz tilbyder et af verdens mest erhvervsvenlige miljøer.
business.p2: Den schweiziske arbejdsstyrke er blandt de mest veluddannede og produktive i verden.

meta.title: Sammenlign schweiziske kantoner — Zürich vs Zug vs Schwyz
meta.description: Interaktiv sammenligning af kantonerne Zürich, Zug og Schwyz til flytning.

hero.title: Kantonsammenligning
hero.subtitle: Vælg den rigtige schweiziske kanton for din familie og virksomhed

zurich.name: Zurich

lifestyle.culture: Opera, art galleries, Michelin-starred dining, lakefront living

zurich.bankingInfo: Home to UBS, Credit Suisse (now UBS), Julius Baer, and dozens of boutique private banks. Full-service crypto banking available (SEBA, Sygnum).

realEstate.lexKoller: Lex Koller applies: non-Swiss residents require authorization for residential property. B-permit holders may purchase primary residence.

bestFor.profile: The urban professional, digital entrepreneur, or family seeking world-class culture and connectivity
bestFor.ideal: Ideal for: crypto entrepreneurs, corporate executives, families valuing urban lifestyle

zug.name: Zug

lifestyle.international: Highly international (35%+ foreign residents, strong expat community)
lifestyle.culture: Elegant lakeside town, close to mountains and Zurich
lifestyle.transport: 30 minutes to Zurich Airport, excellent rail

list: International School of Zug and Luzern (ISZL)

zug.bankingInfo: Crypto Valley ecosystem with blockchain-native banks. Traditional private banking through local branches of major Swiss banks. Family office concentration second only to Geneva.

realEstate.lexKoller: Lex Koller applies. B-permit holders can purchase primary residence. Zug has additional local requirements for some communes.

bestFor.profile: The tax-optimising entrepreneur, family office, or crypto/fintech founder seeking the lowest possible tax burden
bestFor.ideal: Ideal for: family offices, forfait fiscal applicants, tech entrepreneurs

schwyz.name: Schwyz

lifestyle.culture: Alpine landscapes, lake views, traditional Swiss charm
lifestyle.transport: 45 minutes to Zurich Airport, scenic commute

list: International School of Zug and Luzern (Hünenberg campus, nearby)

schwyz.bankingInfo: Private banking through Schwyz-based cantonal bank and branches of major banks. Less institutional density than Zurich or Zug, but ideal for those valuing absolute privacy.

realEstate.lexKoller: Lex Koller applies. Generally more accessible pricing than Zurich or Zug with comparable or lower tax rates.

bestFor.profile: The privacy-focused family or individual seeking the lowest taxes with an Alpine lifestyle and complete discretion
bestFor.ideal: Ideal for: multi-generational families, privacy-focused individuals, retirees

meta.title: Kunde-cases — Move to Switzerland
meta.description: Anonymiserede cases af vellykkede schweiziske flytninger.

caseStudiesPage.disclaimer: Alle cases er anonymiserede. Navne og detaljer er ændret for at beskytte fortrolighed.

techFounder.title: The Tech Founder
techFounder.subtitle: Dubai to Zug in 9 months
techFounder.quote: We needed a jurisdiction that understood both our digital business model and our family's long-term security needs. Switzerland delivered on both.
techFounder.profile: Dubai-based tech entrepreneur, family of 4, post-exit with significant liquidity event

timeline.month3: Forfait fiscal negotiation initiated with Zug authorities
timeline.month6: Real estate acquisition — lakeside property in Zug
timeline.month9: Family office structure established, all services operational

challenges: Complex multi-jurisdictional corporate structure requiring restructuring
Crypto holdings requiring specialized banking documentation
techFounder.outcome: Full family relocation completed. Forfait fiscal approved. Children enrolled at ISZL. Family office operational with Swiss governance framework. Fee: undisclosed.

bankingFamily.title: The Banking Family
bankingFamily.subtitle: Beirut to Schwyz — emergency relocation
bankingFamily.quote: When the banks collapsed, we had 72 hours to make a decision. Our advisors had the Swiss infrastructure ready.
bankingFamily.profile: Lebanese family, 3 generations, significant banking and real estate portfolio, emergency circumstances

timeline.month2: Private banking onboarding (assets transferred from non-Lebanese holdings)
timeline.month9: Full settlement — all three generations established
timeline.month12: Ongoing retainer — estate management and succession planning

challenges: Emergency timeline requiring parallel processing of all workstreams
Assets trapped in Lebanese banking system
Three generations with different residency and care needs
bankingFamily.outcome: All three generations successfully relocated. Private banking relationships established. Estate restructured under Swiss governance. Ongoing succession planning retainer in place.

digitalNomad.title: The Digital Nomad
digitalNomad.subtitle: Riyadh to Zurich in 4 months
digitalNomad.quote: I needed a country that treated crypto as a legitimate asset class and offered real infrastructure for building a business. Zurich was the obvious choice.
digitalNomad.profile: 34-year-old Saudi national, significant cryptocurrency portfolio, active trader and investor, single

timeline.month1: Consultation, canton selection, crypto wealth documentation strategy
timeline.month15: B-permit application with detailed source-of-wealth documentation
timeline.month2: Company formation (Swiss GmbH) for consulting operations
timeline.month3: Crypto-friendly banking setup (SEBA Bank + traditional private bank)
timeline.month4: Apartment secured in Zurich, full relocation completed

challenges: Documenting crypto wealth chain from mining/early-stage purchases to current portfolio
Finding banking partners comfortable with 90%+ crypto-derived wealth
Navigating Swiss crypto tax classification for active trading vs. investment
B-permit for non-EU national with non-traditional wealth profile
digitalNomad.outcome: B-permit granted. Swiss GmbH operational. Dual banking relationship (crypto + traditional) established. Full compliance framework for ongoing crypto trading. 4 months start to finish.

gulfFamilyOffice.title: The Gulf Family Office
gulfFamilyOffice.subtitle: Kuwaiti family office — Swiss SFO established
gulfFamilyOffice.quote: We had wealth management in four jurisdictions, but no unified governance. Switzerland gave us the structure our family needed for the next generation.
gulfFamilyOffice.profile: Kuwaiti family office, CHF 200M+ AUM, multi-generational, operating across GCC, London, and Switzerland

timeline.month1: Scoping: governance audit, jurisdictional review, family charter assessment
timeline.month2: Swiss SFO structure designed — AG incorporated in Zug
timeline.month3: Board formation — 3 Swiss-resident independent directors placed
timeline.month4: Investment committee established, banking mandates restructured
timeline.month5: Governance framework documented and ratified by family council
timeline.month6: Operational — all reporting lines, compliance, and audit frameworks active
timeline.ongoing: Ongoing retainer: quarterly board meetings, annual governance review, ad-hoc advisory

challenges: Aligning governance expectations across three generations with different investment philosophies
Consolidating reporting from four jurisdictions into unified Swiss framework
Placing qualified independent directors who understood both Swiss and GCC business culture
Designing succession framework acceptable to all family branches
gulfFamilyOffice.outcome: Swiss SFO fully operational in Zug. 3 independent directors placed. Governance framework ratified by all family branches. Consolidated reporting across all jurisdictions. Ongoing retainer for quarterly governance and annual review.
